mapper.update: merge into DGN_COMMON_SETTING a using (select #{config.parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as parentId, #{config.treeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as treeType from dual) b on (a.parent_id = b.parentId and a.tree_type = b.treeType) when matched then update set THRESHOLD_VALUE = #{config.thresholdValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ID = #{config.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NAME = #{config.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_ACTIVE = #{config.isActive,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (ID, PARENT_ID, NAME, THRESHOLD_VALUE, TREE_TYPE, IS_ACTIVE) values (#{config.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.name,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.thresholdValue,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.treeType,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.isActive,jdbcType = VARCHAR})

merge into DGN_COMMON_SETTING a using (select #{config.parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as parentId, #{config.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as name1 from dual) b on (a.parent_id = b.parentId and a.name = b.name1) when matched then update set THRESHOLD_VALUE = #{config.thresholdValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ID = #{config.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_ACTIVE = #{config.isActive,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (ID, PARENT_ID, NAME, THRESHOLD_VALUE, TREE_TYPE, IS_ACTIVE) values (#{config.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.name,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.thresholdValue,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.treeType,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.isActive,jdbcType = VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: merge into DGN_COMMON_SETTING a using (select #{config.parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as parentId, #{config.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as id from dual) b on (a.parent_id = b.parentId and a.id = b.id) when matched then update set THRESHOLD_VALUE = #{config.thresholdValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NAME = #{config.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_ACTIVE = #{config.isActive,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (ID, PARENT_ID, NAME, THRESHOLD_VALUE, TREE_TYPE, IS_ACTIVE) values (#{config.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.name,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.thresholdValue,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.treeType,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{config.isActive,jdbcType = VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update DGN_COMMON_SETTING set THRESHOLD_VALUE = #{thresholdConfigSetting.thresholdValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where upper(PARENT_ID) = upper('alarmPush') and upper(ID) = upper(#{thresholdConfigSetting.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete:
delete DGN_COMMON_SETTING
where upper(PARENT_ID) = upper(#{parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}) and upper(ID) in
upper(#{item})
mapper.select: select ID as id, name, THRESHOLD_VALUE as thresholdValue from DGN_COMMON_SETTING where PARENT_ID=#{parentId} and TREE_TYPE = '3'
select ID as id, name, THRESHOLD_VALUE as thresholdValue from DGN_COMMON_SETTING where PARENT_ID=#{parentId} and upper(NAME) = upper(#{name})
mapper.insert: insert into DGN_COMMON_SETTING (ID, PARENT_ID, NAME, LOGICAL_JUDGMENT, THRESHOLD_VALUE, TREE_TYPE, IS_ACTIVE) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{logicalJudgment,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{thresholdValue,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{treeType}, #{isActive,jdbcType = VARCHAR})
